eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Gila, AZ; Arizona; Apache; Cochise; Graham; Greenlee; La Paz; Maricopa; Mohave; Navajo; Pima; Pinal; Santa Cruz; Yavapai; Yuma, AZ; at 11:41 PM ON MAR 21, 2026 Effective until 07:41 AM MAR 22, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County.  The Chandler Police Department is looking for 66 year old William Bertke.  William is a white male, 6 feet tall, 135 pounds, has gray hair and blue eyes.  William was last seen leaving his home in Chandler, AZ in his wheelchair at 9:00 AM on 3/21/26.  He was wearing glasses, a dark gray shirt and jacket and gray jogger pants.  William took a Lyft taxi to the 2500 block of East Southern Avenue in Tempe, AZ at 2:00 PM. William has a medical condition which may cause him to become lost or easily confused.  If you have seen William, please contact the Chandler Police Department at 480-702-4130 or call 911. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
